heading: Available Projects
errorDesc: Project or resource could not be found.
refreshError: Failed to refresh or invalid password.
refreshRateLimit: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment.

fu_projects.default_flaw_desc: Prevents all creatures (both enemies and allies) from casting spells or performing rituals during the scene.
fu_projects.default_desc:
When activated and driven into the ground, this massive, rune-covered blade prevents all spellcasting and rituals.
The effect lasts until the end of the scene or until the Thorn of Dissent is destroyed (6-section Clock).
fu_projects.desc_pot_low: Invention can: Provide light and limited cover, transport people or cargo over land or water.
fu_projects.desc_pot_avg: Invention can: Travel underwater, carry a spell, transmit speech or sounds, perform a specific task on command, provide energy for a short time.
fu_projects.desc_pot_high: Invention can: Fly, briefly alter an area, cancel spell effects, achieve limited intelligence, fight alongside the inventor, provide long-term energy, capture or immobilize a target.
fu_projects.desc_pot_huge: Invention can: Permanently alter an area, carry the power of a demon, prevent a disaster, achieve full intelligence and have its own personality.
fu_projects.desc_area_single: Affects: A human-sized creature, door, tree, weapon.
fu_projects.desc_area_small: Affects: A few human-sized creatures, a large creature, small clearing, room, train car, hut.
fu_projects.desc_area_large: Affects: A crowd, small forest, airship or galleon, castle chamber, house, huge creature.
fu_projects.desc_area_huge: Affects: A fortress, lake, mountain, village, city district.
fu_projects.desc_use_single: After use: Cannot be used again until the inventor creates another copy.
fu_projects.desc_use_perm: After use: Remains ready for future use.
fu_projects.msg_err_libs: Error: Required libraries haven't been loaded.
fu_projects.msg_err_img_gen: An error occurred while generating the image.
fu_projects.msg_err_no_data: No project data detected in this image file.
fu_projects.msg_err_parse:
Error occurred while parsing the file.
